arts.ttl: Football transfer rumours: Man Utd & Chelsea make Gavi contact; Arsenal rival Liverpool for Zubimendi
arts.sum: Arsenal want to sign a new midfielder to replace Thomas Partey in 2025 and are ready to move for Liverpool target Martin Zubimendi of Real Sociedad. With Virgil van Dijk's future up in the air, Liverpool have drawn up a four-man shortlist of replacements which includes Juventus' Gleison Bremer, Sporting CP's Goncalo Inacio, Sevilla's Loic Bade and Crystal Palace's Marc Guehi .

arts.ttl: Chelsea News LIVE: Romano reveals Mudryk TRUTH, Estevao PLAN, POSITIVE Gyokeres message
arts.sum: Our Chelsea transfer live blog brings you all the latest news surrounding the Blues, including exclusives from our own reporters as well as checking out what the other big names are saying (including the likes of Fabrizio Romano and David Ornstein). Chelsea Transfer News LIVE today

arts.ttl: 'I'm not on the bandwagon': TalkSPORT pundit suggests £25m Chelsea player gets unfairly criticised
Roshane Thomas: Lopetegui dismayed by West Ham star whose decline is concerning
arts.sum: Julen Lopetegui was dismayed by Michail Antonio before withdrawing him at half-time last weekend against Fulham, according to Roshane Thomas. Thomas’ article for The Athletic... The post Roshane Thomas: Lopetegui dismayed by West Ham star whose decline is concerning appeared first on West Ham Zone.

arts.ttl: Raheem Sterling told he will be nothing more than a '25-minute man' at Arsenal
arts.sum: Raheem Sterling joined Arsenal on loan before last month's transfer deadline, but the Chelsea outcast has been warned that he is unlikely to play a major role at his new club

arts.ttl: Estevao Willian is already demonstrating why he must be in Enzo Maresca's 2025/26 Chelsea plans
arts.sum: It came as no surprise that questions about Jadon Sancho dominated Enzo Maresca's post-match press conference following Chelsea's 1-0 win over Bournemouth last Saturday. Estevao Willian was in fact the player Maresca was asked about, with the youngster continuing to make quite a name for himself in his homeland of Brazil.

arts.ttl: Chelsea should already be really worried about what is happening to their £51m player – opinion
arts.sum: Chelsea have spent some big money in recent transfer windows trying to solve the puzzle of building a squad ready to compete at the top...

arts.ttl: Man Utd and Chelsea battle for 17-year-old Sporting CP wonderkid
arts.sum: Man Utd's co-owners Ineos, who are heading football operations at the club, are looking to bring in fresh young talent and move away from playing extortionate amounts for their targets. Chelsea, Manchester United and Tottenham are looking at the possibility of signing the Sporting CP winger Geovany Quenda, according to reports.

arts.ttl: Raheem Sterling sets remarkable Champions League record with latest Arsenal appearance
arts.sum: Raheem Sterling made his second appearance for Arsenal when coming off the bench against Atalanta in the Champions League on Thursday night and will next face one of his former clubs

arts.ttl: 'I think': Blues legend Michael Essien makes confident prediction about Chelsea
